qr.description: Convert URLs, Wi-Fi credentials, vCards, and text to QR codes. Download as watermark-free PNG/SVG, free forever, no signup required.

qr-wifi.description: Turn Wi-Fi name and password into a QR code so guests can connect with a single scan. Perfect for cafes, restaurants, and Airbnb hosts.

qr-vcard.description: Encode name, company, phone, and email into a QR code. Scan to save the contact instantly — print on paper business cards for one-second exchanges.

qr-decoder.description: Upload an image with a QR code and it'll be automatically decoded. Works with Wi-Fi, URL, and vCard QRs. Use on PC without a camera.

png-to-jpg.description: Instantly convert PNG images to JPG. Processing happens entirely in your browser — files are never uploaded. Adjustable quality, free, no signup.

jpg-to-png.description: Convert JPG images to PNG. PNG is lossless, ideal for print and editing. Processing happens safely in your browser.

webp-to-jpg.description: Convert WebP images to JPG. Solves compatibility issues when attaching to messengers or documents that don't support WebP.

jpg-to-webp.description: Convert JPG to WebP to reduce file size by 30–70%. Faster page loading and better SEO scores.

image-compress.description: Shrink photo file sizes by 80%+ with minimal quality loss. Perfect for email attachments, forum uploads, and messenger sharing.

image-resize.description: Resize images to any pixel dimensions. Auto-keeps aspect ratio, preserves quality, free, no watermark.

video-to-gif.description: Convert MP4, MOV, WebM videos to animated GIFs. Adjustable FPS, size, and length. Files are processed in your browser and never uploaded.

video-to-mp3.description: Extract audio from videos like MP4 and save as MP3. Useful for lectures, interviews, and music videos. Processing happens in your browser.

video-compress.description: Reduce video file size by 50–80% with minimal quality loss. Solves upload size limits on messengers, email, and forums.

video-trim.description: Cut out the section of a video you want. Set start and end points with sliders. Lossless fast cutting (stream copy method).

hwp-viewer.description: Open .hwp and .hwpx files directly in your browser — no Hancom Office required. Page navigation and zoom supported. Files never leave your device.

hwp-to-text.description: Extract body text from Korean HWP documents as .txt. Useful for pasting into messengers, email, or translators. Safe browser-based processing.

hwp-to-pdf.description: Convert Korean HWP documents to PDF instantly — no Hancom Office needed. Perfect for sharing or printing.

hwp-to-hwpx.description: Convert legacy .hwp files to the Korean government standard .hwpx format (KS X 6101). Useful for public-sector submissions and modern tool compatibility.

pdf-merge.description: Combine multiple PDFs into one. Drag to reorder, and files are processed in your browser and never uploaded.

pdf-split.description: Split a PDF by page or extract specific page ranges. Receive everything as a single ZIP.

pdf-rotate.description: Stand up sideways or upside-down PDF pages. Rotate all pages or specific pages by 90/180/270 degrees.

pdf-delete-pages.description: Remove blank or unnecessary pages from a PDF. Just select page numbers and hit delete.

images-to-pdf.description: Combine photos and scans into a single PDF. Supports JPG/PNG/WebP, choose page size, free reordering.

pdf-reorder.description: Drag PDF page thumbnails to reorder freely. Rotate and delete pages too. All processing in your browser.

pdf-extract.description: Pick page numbers or ranges from a PDF and save them as a new PDF. Useful for sharing only certain pages.

pdf-watermark.description: Add a text watermark (e.g., 'CONFIDENTIAL', company name) to every page of a PDF. Adjustable color, opacity, rotation, and size.

pdf-page-number.description: Automatically add page numbers to each page. Choose position (header/footer, left/center/right), format (1, 1/N, p1), and start number.

pdf-text-extract.description: Extract body text from a PDF as .txt. Useful for searching or translating. Scanned PDFs (images) may not yield text.

pdf-to-images.description: Save each PDF page as PNG or JPG. Adjustable resolution, batch download as ZIP.

favicon-generator.description: Create a complete favicon bundle from a single image. Get 16/32/48/64/128/256 PNGs and ICO file as one ZIP.

image-filter.description: Apply grayscale, sepia, blur, brightness, contrast, and saturation filters to photos. Real-time preview, minimal quality loss, all in your browser.

image-pixelate.description: Apply mosaic to a whole image or selected area to hide faces, license plates, or sensitive info. Adjustable pixel size.

image-stack.description: Combine multiple images into one. Choose horizontal stack, vertical stack, or grid layout. Adjustable spacing and background color.

image-border.description: Add a colored border to a photo. Adjustable thickness, color, and rounded corners. Great for Polaroid-style SNS posts.

exif-viewer.description: Check metadata of JPG/HEIC photos. Camera model, capture time, GPS coordinates, ISO, shutter, aperture, lens, and more — all at a glance.

color-extract.description: Auto-extract main colors from a photo to create a palette. Great for design inspiration and brand color analysis.

image-text-overlay.description: Add titles or captions to photos instantly. Adjustable font, color, size, outline, and position. Perfect for thumbnails, quote graphics, and notice images.

image-to-ascii.description: Convert photos to ASCII art using characters. Adjustable width, invert option, and character sets. Copy as text or save as PNG.

heic-to-jpg.description: Convert .heic photos from iPhone to .jpg that displays everywhere. Solves messenger and document compatibility issues at once.

image-exif-strip.description: Wipe location (GPS), capture time, and device info from photos. Recommended for protecting privacy before posting to SNS.

image-crop.description: Crop a photo to the area you want. Supports 1:1, 4:3, 16:9 fixed ratios or free crop.

image-rotate.description: Rotate photos 90/180/270 degrees or flip horizontally/vertically. Perfect for straightening sideways photos.

gif-to-mp4.description: Convert animated GIFs to MP4 video. Usually reduces file size by 70–90% with universal platform compatibility.

video-rotate.description: Stand up sideways videos or flip horizontally/vertically. Based on ffmpeg.wasm, keeps audio intact.

video-thumbnail.description: Save a still frame from a chosen video moment as PNG. Useful for making YouTube thumbnails or capturing lecture slides.

video-speed.description: Slow down or speed up video playback. Useful for fast-listening to lectures or analyzing exercise videos. Based on ffmpeg.wasm.

audio-trim.description: Cut a section from MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, and other audio files. Lossless fast cutting via ffmpeg.wasm.

markdown-toc.description: Auto-extract H1–H6 headings from markdown body to create a table of contents. Auto-indentation and anchor links included.

markdown-table.description: Set row/column counts and fill cells — markdown table syntax is generated automatically. Add/remove cells, alignment, with live preview.

kor-romanize.description: Convert Korean Hangul to romanization using the National Institute of Korean Language's Revised Romanization. Useful for English business cards, names, and addresses.

morse.description: Convert text to Morse code and back. Supports English, numbers, and Korean jamo, with audio playback.

text-to-speech.description: Read text aloud with computer voice. Uses OS-installed voices in Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, and more. Adjustable speed and pitch.

word-frequency.description: Count word and character occurrences in text. Useful for analyzing writing, papers, and logs. Stopword removal and case-insensitive options.

latex-editor.description: Enter LaTeX math and KaTeX renders it live. Supports integrals, sigma, matrices, fractions, and more. Save as PNG/SVG or copy code.

num-to-korean.description: Convert 12,345 won to '일만 이천삼백사십오 원' for contracts, receipts, and tax invoices. Auto-adds 일/금/원정 formatting.

kor-eng-keyboard.description: Convert 'dkssudgktpdy' (English typed on Hangul keyboard) to '안녕하세요' instantly. Works both ways. Useful for recovering accidentally typed text.

character-counter.description: Count characters, words, and lines in real time. Use for Naver blog, cover letters, papers, and any character-limited text.

text-case.description: Convert text to UPPER, lower, Title, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, or CONSTANT_CASE instantly.

text-sort.description: Sort multi-line text alphabetically, reversed, by length, or randomly. Case-insensitive and dedupe options.

lorem-ipsum.description: Generate dummy text for design mockups. Both Latin Lorem Ipsum and Korean filler sentences, by word/sentence/paragraph count.

markdown-preview.description: Type markdown and see live HTML preview. Supports GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM) and HTML source copy.

spell-check.description: Check 100+ commonly misspelled Korean expressions instantly. Processed in your browser without external servers — text is never sent away. This is a beginner/intermediate guide, not perfect for context-dependent errors.

markdown-math.description: Render markdown with LaTeX math in real time. KaTeX-based, exports to PDF — perfect for paper drafts and class materials.

diff-checker.description: Compare two texts side by side to see additions, deletions, and changes. Useful for code review and document tracking.

text-dedupe.description: Remove duplicate lines from multi-line text. Case-insensitive, whitespace-ignore, and empty-line options.

docx-viewer.description: Open Microsoft Word .docx files in your browser without Word. Extract text only or save as .txt.

korean-age.description: Enter birth date to see Western age, Korean age, and yeonnai simultaneously. Reflects Korea's June 2023 standardization to international age.

lunar-solar.description: Convert Korean lunar and solar dates in both directions. Range 1391–2050, leap month support, and ganji display.

caesar-cipher.description: Encrypt and decrypt text with Caesar cipher. ROT13/ROT47 presets and custom 1–25 rotation.

http-status.description: Search the meaning of HTTP response codes 100–599. Standard (RFC) codes plus common non-standard ones (418, 429, etc.).

css-gradient.description: Build linear/radial gradients visually by adding and adjusting color stops, then copy the CSS code. Live preview.

base-converter.description: Convert between decimal, binary, octal, and hex instantly. Negatives and decimals supported, with auto-digit grouping.

html-entity.description: Encode or decode HTML entities. Supports numeric entities for Korean and emoji as well.

password-strength.description: Score password strength by length, character types, and predictability. Detects common passwords, repeated patterns, and keyboard sequences.

color-contrast.description: Calculate the contrast ratio between text and background colors and check WCAG AA/AAA compliance. Use for accessibility audits.

lotto.description: Generate Korean Lotto 6/45 numbers using Web Crypto's secure RNG. Multiple games at once, with exclude option.

json-formatter.description: Pretty-print or minify JSON. Shows syntax errors and supports key sorting.

url-encoder.description: Percent-encode Korean and special characters for URLs, or decode them. Supports both encodeURIComponent and encodeURI modes.

hash-generator.description: Calculate SHA-256, SHA-512, SHA-1, and MD5 hashes of text or files instantly. Use for integrity verification and checksums.

uuid-generator.description: Generate multiple cryptographically secure UUID v4s at once. Supports hyphen and uppercase options.

timestamp-converter.description: Convert Unix timestamps (seconds or milliseconds) to human-readable dates and back. Supports ISO 8601, local, and UTC display.

base64-image.description: Encode an image as a Base64 data URL or decode a data URL back to an image. Useful for inline-embedding images in CSS/email.

csv-to-json.description: Convert CSV data to JSON array and back. First row recognized as header, with proper handling of quoted and comma-containing values.

yaml-json.description: Freely convert between YAML and JSON. Useful for Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, and OpenAPI config files.

sql-formatter.description: Pretty-print complex SQL queries. Supports 14 dialects including MySQL, Postgres, SQLite, MSSQL, BigQuery, and Snowflake.

cron-parser.description: Enter a cron expression to see a human-readable description and the next N execution times. Supports 5-field and 6-field (with seconds).

cidr-calc.description: From CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.0.0/24), calculate the network address, broadcast, subnet mask, and usable hosts.

jwt-decoder.description: Decode JWT header and payload. See expiry and issuer at a glance. No signature verification — use for debugging only.

css-shadow.description: Build box-shadow visually with sliders and copy the code. Supports multiple shadow layers with live preview.

json-xml.description: Freely convert between JSON and XML. Attribute handling and indent options.

dday.description: Calculate days between two dates, D-day until a specific date, or the date N days from today. All in one tool.

unit-converter.description: Convert length (m, km, inch, ft), weight (g, kg, lb, oz), temperature (°C, °F, K), area (m², py, acre), and volume (L, mL, gallon).

regex-tester.description: Enter a regex pattern and flags (gimsuy) to see live matches. Supports capture groups and replacement preview.

color-converter.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color codes. A free tool for designers and developers.

base64.description: Convert between text and Base64. URL-safe option supported, with automatic Korean handling.

password-generator.description: Generate cryptographically secure random passwords. Choose length, uppercase, numbers, and special characters.

slug-generator.description: Convert Korean, spaces, and special characters into SEO-friendly URL slugs. Optional Korean romanization.

html-minifier.description: Remove whitespace, comments, and line breaks from HTML to reduce file size. For faster load times in production.

css-minifier.description: Strip whitespace, comments, and unnecessary semicolons from CSS to save bytes.

js-minifier.description: Minify and mangle JavaScript with Terser. Identifier shortening and dead code elimination included.

json-diff.description: Compare two JSONs object-by-object to show added, removed, and changed keys.

text-binary.description: Convert text to bit-level binary and back. Supports both ASCII and UTF-8.

text-hex.description: Convert text to hexadecimal and back. Useful for debugging and encoding checks.

ansi-to-html.description: Convert ANSI terminal escape sequences to HTML to display terminal colors on web pages.

keycode-viewer.description: Press any key to see its event properties: key, code, keyCode, and which.

file-to-base64.description: Encode any file (images, PDFs, videos) as Base64 data URLs. Decode data URLs back to files too.

unicode-lookup.description: Look up Unicode codepoints (U+XXXX) and names for characters, or build characters from codepoints.

svg-minifier.description: Strip comments, extra whitespace, and editor metadata from SVG files to reduce size.

text-reverse.description: Reverse text by character, word, or line. For memes, fun, and encryption practice.

line-numbers.description: Automatically number lines in multi-line text. Adjustable start number, separator, and digit padding.

reading-time.description: Estimate presentation time (WPM) and reading time from character count. Adjustable speed for Korean and English.

hanja-to-hangul.description: Convert 600 common Hanja characters to Korean Hangul readings. Useful for names, articles, and contracts.

ascii-box.description: Wrap text in clean ASCII / Unicode boxes. For code comments, README highlights, and chat messages.

encoding-convert.description: Restore broken Korean characters from EUC-KR/CP949 files misread as UTF-8.

line-joiner.description: Join multi-line text into a single line or connect with commas, semicolons, or other separators. Useful for SQL IN clauses from spreadsheet cells.

text-card.description: Turn quotes, notices, or sayings into SNS-shareable image cards and save as PNG. Gradient background, adjustable font and size.

image-compare.description: Create a slider preview comparing two images. Great for before/after edits and renovations.

image-zip.description: Bundle multiple images into one ZIP file. Convenient for email attachments, messenger sharing, and backups.

qr-logo.description: Insert a logo or icon into the center of a QR code. Great for branded QRs. Error correction level auto-adjusted.

qr-text.description: Insert text (shop name, person, event title, brand text) into the center of a QR code. Customize color and background shape freely.

cite-format.h1: Citation Formatter (APA · MLA · Chicago · Harvard · IEEE)
cite-format.description: Enter author, year, title, journal — get all 5 major citation formats simultaneously. Supports journal articles, books, and websites.

doi-lookup.description: Paste a DOI or ISBN and we fetch metadata from CrossRef / Open Library to generate APA, MLA, and Chicago references automatically.

bibtex-convert.description: Convert BibTeX entries from LaTeX into plain-text APA, MLA, or Chicago references. Useful when writing in Word or Hancom.

bib-sort.description: Sort a reference list alphabetically, remove duplicates, and preview hanging-indent formatting used by APA / MLA.

title-case.description: Auto-capitalize English paper or essay titles per APA, Chicago, and MLA rules. Short prepositions and conjunctions stay lowercase.

video-merge.description: Join multiple videos in sequence into one file. Based on ffmpeg.wasm. Same codec recommended.

video-mute.description: Completely remove sound from a video. ffmpeg copies the video stream only for fast processing.

video-info.description: Show video resolution, length, file size, duration, and basic info.

pdf-blank-page.description: Insert blank pages at any position in a PDF. Useful for matching print page counts or adding note space.

pdf-metadata.description: View and edit a PDF's title, author, subject, keywords, and creator info.

pdf-crop.description: Crop top/bottom/left/right margins from all PDF pages in millimeters. Useful for removing scan margins.

time-calc.description: Add or subtract time from a time of day, or calculate the difference between two times. Supports both 24h and 12h notations.

wage-converter.description: Convert between hourly, daily, weekly, monthly, and annual wages. Based on Korea's 40-hour week (209 hours/month including weekly holiday allowance). Compares to Korean minimum wage.

due-date.description: Estimate due date, current pregnancy week, and trimester from last menstrual period (LMP) or conception date. Based on Naegele's rule.

sci-calc.description: Supports trigonometry, logarithms, powers, square roots, and other engineering/science calculations. Expression-based input handles long complex calculations.

percent.description: Calculate N% of X, what % X is of Y, change rate from X to Y, and X with N% increase/decrease — all on one screen.

discount.description: Calculate discounted price from original price and rate, find discount rate from prices, or reverse-calculate original price.

vat.description: Auto-calculate supply price, VAT, and total based on Korea's 10% VAT rate. Reverse-calculate supply price from total too.

bmi.description: Calculate BMI from height and weight, with WHO Asia-Pacific obesity classification: underweight, normal, overweight, obese.

compound.description: Calculate maturity amount with compound interest from principal, rate, and term. Supports lump-sum deposits and monthly savings modes.

world-time.description: See current time in Seoul, Tokyo, New York, London, Paris, Sydney, and more major cities at once. Add/remove cities, real-time updates.

name-picker.description: Randomly pick N items from a list. Great for selecting dinner menus, presenters, or sweepstakes winners.

caffeine.description: Sum total caffeine from today's coffee, tea, and energy drinks, and compare to the daily recommended limit (400mg for adults).

zodiac.description: Enter your birthday to find your Western 12-sign zodiac, its period, and personality traits.

chinese-zodiac.description: Find your Chinese zodiac animal (rat, ox, tiger, rabbit...) and heavenly stem from birth year.

alcohol-converter.description: Convert alcohol content between drink types. Compare soju, beer, wine, whiskey, and more.

bmr.description: Calculate BMR and activity-adjusted TDEE from gender, age, height, and weight. Use as baseline calories for diet/bulk.

running-pace.description: Enter any two of distance, time, or pace to get the third. Includes finish time predictions for 5K, 10K, half, and full marathon.

tip-calculator.description: Enter bill total, tip rate, and party size to get per-person share. For US/EU restaurants.

unit-price.description: Compare prices of two products of different sizes per unit (100ml, 100g, etc.) to see which is cheaper.

dice-coin.description: Roll various dice (D4, D6, D8, D10, D12, D20, D100) and flip coins. For board games, TRPGs, and decisions.

rps.description: Play rock paper scissors against the computer. Win rate stats included.

korea-holidays.description: See Korean legal holidays for this and next year at a glance. Includes lunar festivals and alternate holidays.

lunch-picker.description: Use the roulette when you can't decide. Preloaded Korean/Chinese/Japanese/Western categories, or add your own menus.

baseball-stats.description: Calculate pitcher ERA, hitter batting average, OBP, SLG, and OPS instantly. For amateur baseball and watching games.

book-reading-time.description: Estimate how long it'll take to finish a book based on total pages and your reading speed. Uses average Korean reading speed.

image-invert.description: Invert image colors to create a negative effect.

image-watermark-img.description: Overlay a logo or image as a watermark on a photo. Adjustable position, opacity, and size.

image-color-transparent.description: Make a specific color (usually white background) transparent in an image.

image-channels.description: Separate an image's red, green, and blue channels into grayscale images.

image-free-rotate.description: Rotate images freely in 1° increments. Useful for straightening crooked photos.

html-to-text.description: Strip all tags from HTML and extract body text only.

html-to-markdown.description: Convert HTML to markdown. Useful for blog migrations and wiki conversions.

markdown-to-text.description: Strip markdown syntax and leave only the text.

text-compress.description: Compress long text with LZ-string into short strings.

text-blockquote.description: Prepend '>' to text in markdown blockquote or email quote format.

data-size.description: Convert between bytes, kilobytes, megabytes, gigabytes, terabytes, and petabytes. Both SI (1000) and IEC (1024) supported.

mime-types.description: Search by file extension or MIME type, both directions.

css-colors.description: All 148 CSS named colors with their HEX codes.

http-methods.description: Summary of HTTP method meanings, usage, and idempotency.

env-parser.description: Convert environment variable files to JSON objects.

jamo-decompose.description: Decompose Hangul syllables into initial/medial/final jamo, or compose them back.

duration-format.description: Convert numeric seconds to human-readable format and back.

bcrypt-hash.description: Generate and verify bcrypt hashes with adjustable cost factor.

rot-all.description: Display results for ROT1–25 all at once. Useful for Caesar cipher brute-force decoding.

card-mask.description: Auto-detect and asterisk-mask card numbers, RRNs, phone numbers, and emails.

pdf-images-extract.description: Render each PDF page as a high-resolution PNG and save as a ZIP bundle.

pdf-n-up.description: Combine multiple pages into one page in 2x2 or 2x1 layouts for printable booklets.

pdf-page-size.description: Change all pages to A4, Letter, Legal, B5, or other sizes.

audio-merge.description: Join multiple MP3s in order into one.

audio-volume.description: Boost or lower audio in decibel (dB) units.

exchange-rate.description: Enter the rate manually and convert between currencies. Check live rates externally first.

statistics.description: Mean, median, mode, standard deviation, variance, and quartiles.

car-fuel.description: Calculate cost from fuel efficiency, gas price, and distance.

rent-calc.description: Convert between jeonse (lump-sum deposit) and monthly rent using the conversion rate.

sleep-recommend.description: Find optimal wake/bedtime based on 90-minute sleep cycles.

blood-donation.description: Calculate donation intervals based on Korean Red Cross standards.

installment.description: Calculate monthly payment from principal, rate, and term.

korean-biz-num.description: Validate 10-digit Korean business registration number checksum.

korean-rrn.description: Validate RRN checksum and extract birth date and gender. Browser-only processing.

family-kinship.description: Enter paternal/maternal relations to see Korean family honorifics.

number-format.description: Various formats with commas, underscores, and Korean unit notation (e.g., 100만).

stars.description: Visualize scores as star ratings. Supports half-stars.

golf-handicap.description: Estimate USGA-style handicap from recent scores.

text-similarity.description: Edit distance and similarity between two strings.

font-preview.description: Preview how text looks in a given font.

word-cloud.description: Visualize frequently used words by size.

emoji-search.description: Search and copy emojis by keyword.

user-agent.description: Extract browser, OS, and device info from UA strings.

password-comparator.description: Compare strength of two passwords side by side.

number-to-english.description: Convert numbers to English words. For English checks and contracts.

text-stats.description: Analyze characters, words, sentences, paragraphs, and readability.
